37typedef enum { MEM_FLAG_NONE = 0x00, MEM_FLAG_ION = 0x01 } memory_flags_t;
38
40typedef struct {
41 uint8_t* data;
42 size_t offset;
43 size_t size;
44 size_t maxsize;
45 memory_flags_t flags;
46} memory_t;
47
54static inline void memory_add_flags(memory_t* memory, memory_flags_t flags) {
55 uint32_t combined = (uint32_t)memory->flags | (uint32_t)flags;
56 memory->flags = (memory_flags_t)combined;
57}
58
59#ifdef __cplusplus
60}
61#endif

memory_add_flags
static void memory_add_flags(memory_t *memory, memory_flags_t flags)
